analysis.object: T753: The Tropicalization-Algebraization Dictionary depth analysis

classical_variety.description: Classical algebraic variety X/K -- has tropical shadow

trop_x.description: Tropical variety trop(X) = image of X under valuation map

classical_cycle.description: Classical algebraic cycle Z in Z^p(X)

tropical_cycle.description: Tropical cycle in trop(Z) -- fan with multiplicities

has_lift_points.description: Classical points -> tropical points: always works via valuation

has_lift_hypersurfaces.description: Classical hypersurfaces -> tropical hypersurfaces: Kapranov (T724) works

no_lift_cycles_codim2.description: Tropical cycles codim >= 2: no universal algebraization -- ENEMY identified T753
no_lift_cycles_codim2.reason: The dictionary gap: codim >= 2 tropical cycles may not lift
